Title: User successfully logs in
Preconditions: User has a valid username and password.
Test Steps:
1. Enter the username "testuser" in the login form.
2. Enter the password "testpassword" in the password field.
3. Click the "Login" button.
Expected Result: The user is redirected to the dashboard page.

Title: User fails to log in due to invalid credentials
Preconditions: User enters incorrect username or password.
Test Steps:
1. Enter the username "wronguser" in the login form.
2. Enter the password "wrongpassword" in the password field.
3. Click the "Login" button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating incorrect username or password.

Title: User logs out successfully
Test Steps: 1. Click the "Logout" button.
Expected Result: The user is redirected to the login page.

Title: User views product details
Test Steps:
1. Enter the product name "Example Product" in the search bar.
2. Click the "View" button.
Expected Result: The user is redirected to the product details page.

Title: User fails to view product details due to invalid product name
Test Steps:
1. Enter the product name "InvalidProduct" in the search bar.
2. Click the "View" button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating the product does not exist.

Title: User adds product to cart
Preconditions: User is logged in and product exists.
Test Steps:
1. Enter the product name "Example Product" in the search bar.
2. Click the "Add" button.
Expected Result: The product is added to the user's cart.

Title: User fails to add product to cart due to invalid product name
Test Steps:
1. Enter the product name "InvalidProduct" in the search bar.
2. Click the "Add" button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating the product does not exist.

Title: Admin edits product details
Test Data:
- Product Name: Example Product
- New Description: Updated Description
Test Steps:
1. Enter the product name "Example Product" in the search bar.
2. Click the "Edit" button.
3. Update the product description to "Updated Description".
4. Click the "Save" button.
Expected Result: The product details are updated in the system.

Title: Admin fails to edit product details due to invalid product name
Test Data:
- Product Name: InvalidProduct
- New Description: Updated Description
Test Steps:
1. Enter the product name "InvalidProduct" in the search bar.
2. Click the "Edit" button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating the product does not exist.

Title: Admin removes product from cart
Preconditions: Admin is logged in and product exists in the cart.
Test Steps:
1. Enter the product name "Example Product" in the search bar.
2. Click the "Remove" button.
Expected Result: The product is removed from the admin's cart.

Title: Admin fails to remove product from cart due to invalid product name
Test Steps:
1. Enter the product name "InvalidProduct" in the search bar.
2. Click the "Remove" button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating the product does not exist.

Title: User logs in, views product, adds to cart, logs out
Test Steps:
1. Enter the username "testuser" in the login form.
2. Enter the password "testpassword" in the password field.
3. Click the "Login" button.
4. Enter the product name "Example Product" in the search bar.
5. Click the "View" button.
6. Click the "Add" button.
7. Click the "Logout" button.
Expected Result: The user is redirected to the login page.

Title: Admin logs in, edits product, removes product from cart, logs out
Test Steps:
1. Enter the username "adminuser" in the login form.
2. Enter the password "adminpassword" in the password field.
3. Click the "Login" button.
4. Enter the product name "Example Product" in the search bar.
5. Click the "Edit" button.
6. Update the product description to "Updated Description".
7. Click the "Save" button.
8. Enter the product name "Example Product" in the search bar.
9. Click the "Remove" button.
10. Click the "Logout" button.
Expected Result: The admin is redirected to the login page.
